caption: A woman wearing black-rimmed glasses and a dark top is positioned on the right side of the frame, partially obscured by a large, white three-dimensional price tag. The image is a promotional advertisement for VirtualShield, with the company's logo appearing at the top and bottom left. Bold white text on a dark background reads "Stay Home, Stay Protected." and "Extra 50% OFF". Below this, a block of smaller white text discusses the impact of COVID-19 on economics and the importance of online security. A prominent price of "$2.50 /month" is displayed in large white characters. A red button reads "Start Now for FREE", followed by a line that says "Click the button above to claim your 50% discount!". Across the sequence of frames, the visual composition remains static, with no movement or changes in the woman's expression, the text, or the layout of the graphical elements.
